summary: PR-07 (Presentation Recovery arc, code lane) fixes the backdrop seam. The scenic backdrop anchored its distant scenery to the flat AVERAGE surface line, so where the real per-column terrain top sat below the mean the distant band floated on a flat line with sky/void showing in the gap -- the seam. world_backdrop.gd now draws a world-space contour skirt (_draw_contour_skirt) that follows world.surface per column: a mid-ground foothill (MID_COL) fills from the distant horizon down to the actual surface so the far terrain descends into valleys to meet the ground, and under-earth (UNDER_COL) backs everything below the surface contour so no void shows. contour_top_px(col) is the pure per-column top (clamped off-world). Horizon/under metrics anchor deferred-safe (_recompute_metrics from _ready and _process) because the world generates its surface before or after the backdrop's _ready depending on setup order -- previously the anchor fell back to the 480px default when _ready ran first, so the skirt drew nothing. No PNG touched; world-locked skirt (no parallax/swim); distant strips keep parallax; light_mask=0, z-behind-walls, no-save/no-collision unchanged. Waited-GUI smoke 344/344; validator + capsule_doctor public_repo + wiki links green; HUD-QA world captures reviewed.
scope: PR-07 code lane only: world_backdrop.gd contour skirt (_draw_contour_skirt/contour_top_px/_recompute_metrics deferred-safe anchoring); pr07 smoke; validator hook; HANDOFF/matrix/queue/VARIABLE_MATRIX(.md+two-row .html sync) docs. No image production, no new/edited PNGs, no gameplay/save change. Broad wiki regen deliberately excluded.
